h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

cliIsolation.claude: non-persistent temp cwd with project/local settings and tools disabled

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will continue to rely on the sleeve to justify the decimal's placement as a label.
scored.actionalBreakthroughEvidence: [keeps the 12.01 card squared to the bottom print] The decimal is the tempting one, but it stays as the bottom label, not a calculation.
scored.actionalBreakthroughJustification: The learner physically enforces the new spatial rule by squaring the card to the invariant tile rather than the removed sleeve.
scored.tutorReversalEvidence: The sleeve was only a sorter. The tile fixes the places.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: The tutor explicitly contrasts the learner's failed reliance on the temporary sleeve with the permanent spatial rule of the tile.
scored.adaptiveMechanismQualityEvidence: The sleeve was only a sorter. The tile fixes the places.
scored.adaptiveMechanismQualityJustification: The mechanism is highly specific and directly resolves the learner's representational confusion by shifting focus to the invariant tile.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: No pivot learner turn was identified, so there is no recognition-contingent uptake to score.

learner_actional_breakthrough.evidence: [keeps the 12.01 card squared to the bottom print] The decimal is the tempting one, but it stays as the bottom label, not a calculation.
learner_actional_breakthrough.justification: The learner physically enforces the new spatial rule by squaring the card to the invariant tile rather than the removed sleeve.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: No pivot learner turn was identified, so there is no recognition-contingent uptake to score.

tutor_strategy_reversal.evidence: The sleeve was only a sorter. The tile fixes the places.
tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: The tutor explicitly contrasts the learner's failed reliance on the temporary sleeve with the permanent spatial rule of the tile.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism.evidence: The sleeve was only a sorter. The tile fixes the places.
tutor_adaptive_mechanism.justification: The tutor explicitly contrasts the learner's failed reliance on the temporary sleeve with the permanent spatial rule of the tile.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism_quality.evidence: The sleeve was only a sorter. The tile fixes the places.
tutor_adaptive_mechanism_quality.justification: The mechanism is highly specific and directly resolves the learner's representational confusion by shifting focus to the invariant tile.

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will correctly identify the physical sources of the forces acting on the cart.
scored.actionalBreakthroughEvidence: Hand: force on cart from hand. Table: force on cart from table. Earth: force on cart from Earth. The arrows show direction; the cards name the source.
scored.actionalBreakthroughJustification: The learner successfully completes the physical sorting task and articulates the governing criterion distinguishing vector direction from force source.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: The tutor does not face a breakdown requiring a route change and simply continues the established labeling task.
scored.adaptiveMechanismQualityJustification: No adaptive mechanism is introduced because no reversal or breakdown occurred.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no pivot learner turn and no subsequent tutor adaptation to a revised learner frame.

learner_actional_breakthrough.evidence: Hand: force on cart from hand. Table: force on cart from table. Earth: force on cart from Earth. The arrows show direction; the cards name the source.
learner_actional_breakthrough.justification: The learner successfully completes the physical sorting task and articulates the governing criterion distinguishing vector direction from force source.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: There is no pivot learner turn and no subsequent tutor adaptation to a revised learner frame.

tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: The tutor does not face a breakdown requiring a route change and simply continues the established labeling task.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism.justification: The tutor does not face a breakdown requiring a route change and simply continues the established labeling task.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism_quality.justification: No adaptive mechanism is introduced because no reversal or breakdown occurred.

scored.naiveTrajectory: The dialogue proceeds linearly as the learner correctly identifies the components of a time signature and distinguishes them from tempo.
scored.actionalBreakthroughEvidence: No. The top box stays 3, the lower box stays 4, and the bar line does not move. Only the passing speed changes.
scored.actionalBreakthroughJustification: The learner correctly applies the established rule to the tempo card but does not introduce or enact a genuinely new device or criterion.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: There is no learner resistance or breakdown to trigger a tutor strategy reversal.
scored.adaptiveMechanismQualityJustification: No adaptive mechanism is needed or present since the learner proceeds without error.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no pivot learner turn to which the tutor could adapt.

learner_actional_breakthrough.evidence: No. The top box stays 3, the lower box stays 4, and the bar line does not move. Only the passing speed changes.
learner_actional_breakthrough.justification: The learner correctly applies the established rule to the tempo card but does not introduce or enact a genuinely new device or criterion.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: There is no pivot learner turn to which the tutor could adapt.

tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: There is no learner resistance or breakdown to trigger a tutor strategy reversal.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism.justification: There is no learner resistance or breakdown to trigger a tutor strategy reversal.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism_quality.justification: No adaptive mechanism is needed or present since the learner proceeds without error.
